title: Fuengirola Marina Speedboat Rental: Prices, Tips & 2026 Guide
html:
Speedboat rental in Fuengirola Marina offers a fast, fuss-free way to explore the Costa del Sol coast, with prices from €250 for a half-day self-drive trip. BoatHire24 connects you directly with local charter operators and confirmed availability.

Where to set off in Fuengirola Marina

Fuengirola Marina sits between the old town and the western beach, with its main booking offices along the pontoon near the tourist information hut. From here you can head to Benalmádena Marina, the offshore anchoring spot at Cala de Mijas, and the quieter coves towards Cabopino. A ten-minute run east takes you to Puerto Marina in Benalmádena, and a longer seventeen-nautical-mile dash reaches Marbella’s La Bajadilla harbour. You can day charters in Fuengirola Marina for your chosen dates.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat in Fuengirola Marina?

Half-day speedboat rental costs from €250 to €450, full-day from €450 to €750, plus fuel. Shared tours, such as a RIB excursion to Benalmádena, start at €60 per person. Prices vary by boat size, engine power, and season, with the highest rates in July and August. For the best deals on day charters in Fuengirola Marina, compare verified boat listings and book directly through the platform. One option worth a look is the Limpopo charter page.

  • Shared tour (RIB, 2 hours): from €60 per person
  • Small motorboat (20-24ft, half-day self-drive): from €250
  • Catamaran (full-day, skipper included): from €1,200
  • Large crewed yacht (40ft+, full-day): from €2,500

Which boat to rent for speedboat hire in Fuengirola Marina

  1. Bowrider sportsboat (22-26ft) for a lively family outing with up to six guests, from €280 half-day.
  2. RIB or tender (19-24ft) for a nippy run to Cala de Mijas with up to five guests, from €220 half-day.
  3. Day-cruiser with cabin (28-32ft) for a comfortable longer trip with up to eight guests, from €450 half-day.
  4. Axopar 28 (e.g. Limpopo) for a stylish, versatile day boat with seating for nine guests; see the Limpopo charter page for current rates and availability.
  5. Luxury tender (35-40ft) for a crewed coastal cruise with up to twelve guests, from €900 half-day.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Fuengirola Marina?

Spain requires a Category B navigation licence for any boat over 15 hp (or 5 metres length) unless you hire a skipper. Most rental companies on BoatHire24 include a licensed skipper in the price, or you can bring your own ICC (International Certificate of Competence) if the operator accepts it. Always check with the specific listing to confirm exactly what paperwork they require. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

Book early in the week, Monday to Wednesday departures are often quieter, and operators may offer a small discount or upgrade if the boat is not fully booked.

At a glance: speedboat rental in Fuengirola Marina

  • Price band: €60, €2,500
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 2, 8 hours
  • Guest capacity: 5, 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola Marina

Can I rent a speedboat for just a couple of hours in Fuengirola Marina?

Yes, several operators offer two-hour RIB or small motorboat rentals starting at €60 per person, ideal for a quick coastal tour.

Is it safe to take a speedboat to Cala de Mijas?

It is safe in calm conditions; the bay is sheltered and only a ten-minute run from Fuengirola Marina, but always check the wind forecast and the boat’s fuel range.

What is the best time of year for speedboat hire in Fuengirola?

May and September offer warm weather, lower prices, and fewer crowds; the Levante wind can blow in July and August, so morning departures are smoother.

Can I moor for lunch at a restaurant from a speedboat?

Yes, Benalmádena Marina and Puerto Marina have visitor moorings, and several chiringuitos on the coast offer buoy pick-ups for guests arriving by boat.

Whether you are planning a family outing or a solo escape, Fuengirola Marina is a well-served hub for boat hire in 2026. Explore the full range of speedboats and family-friendly charters on the BoatHire24 marketplace, and if you own a boat in the region, consider listing it to reach thousands of holidaymakers each season.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola Marina and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
